channel.title: WIDAR on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in WIDAR on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to create scan and edit 3D models on smartphones using WIDAR.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-nHVp7fDjmuQ/Y5y46tzr4UI/AAAAAAAAPxA/1k_5gQeiEJ40yC05IHyVvnd-BruGSdCawCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1671215331463010-0.png" alt=""> 3D aka 3 dimension object has length, height, and depth thus it visual look and feel is much detailed and better then in 1D and 2D dimension as in 1D and 2D objects there will be no dept due to that they look and feel flat though they have physical presence and has own importance with number of pros and cons but usually most people like and prefer to see and create 3D objects as they are 3D objects themselves including that 3D objects are way visually more appealing and attractive to eyes then the 1D and 2D objects isn’t it?
